name: screen-guardian
description: Ultra-light compatibility-first AI screen access with fallback adapters.

interface.shortDescription: 不强迫升级的超轻量 AI 屏幕访问。
interface.longDescription: Screen Guardian is freedom-preserving capability infrastructure for personal AI. This release adds arbitrary-complexity decision-policy envelopes and periodic or feature-triggered monitor profiles for screen, webpage, program, video, audio, error, and model-detected events. Optional paths stay inactive until configured or called.
defaultPrompt: Watch a window briefly for visual changes.
Turn an optional capability on or off.
Check whether audio capture is available.
